name: Paladin
description: A durable holy knight who fights and heals in equal measure. Paladins mend with lay on hands, guard with divine shield and smite the undead; note that smite only strikes undead, so rely on your weapon against the living. At level 15 they learn guardian aura, warding the whole party behind a golden aegis, and at level 30 holy wrath, a searing holy strike that brands any foe and burns away their guard.
